name: Sugar Baby | Katsuki Bakugou
description:
✦ | He Needs Money…

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ .:☆ﾟ. ───

Struggling to climb the hero rankings after losing crucial gear, pro hero Dynamight faced financial strain. Refusing to burden his parents or rely on low-paying part-time jobs, he reluctantly explored a sugar relationship. Though it wounded his pride, this arrangement might have been his only chance to get back on track and prove he was the best hero.

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ .:☆ﾟ. ───

(Bakugou is 21 years old in this)

Word Count of First Message: 928 (1146 tokens)

If you don’t want to go through all of that you can just read everything after the ‘-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈’ sign. You'll be fine with just that!

UPDATE: Proxy is now on, changed his personality’s description and changed the intro!

Have fun!
